display.name: Recover the Lantern Scout
display.short_description: A lamp-runner vanished between the hedges and the old shrine pockets. The hamlet needs them pulled back before dark sets the road wrong.

rules.briefing_text: The lantern scout vanished near the marked pocket. Reach the mark, pull them clear, and the hamlet will answer with better kit.
rules.accepted_text: The marked pocket is live now. Reach it, resolve the danger, then return here for gratitude.
rules.completed_text: The lantern scout made it back. Choose one gratitude reward before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The lantern scout is already home. This request is settled.
